limitations: Merged NodeSlide core/React changes are not a complete NodeKit release; the remaining pull requests still require coordinated review.
No production application was deployed in this rollout.
No paid resource was activated and no destructive migration ran.
Under-30 local setup was observed once but not repeated consistently.
The NodeSlide change card is source-bound and transport-verified, but its full claims are not independently evidence-certified and its PPTX export/reopen path is not verified.
NodeBench remains on its existing runtime until shadow parity proves promotion is safe.
